jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Safexpress
jsonLd.description:
Join the Safexpress family as a Fleet Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Safexpress:
Safexpress is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Safexpress!
